content:
@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: header_spoof_auth_bypass ⇒ if(userId)
P: strip_untrusted_header('x-user-id') → prefer(session_userId)
V: test_with_valid_x-user-id ∧ test_without_x-user-id
R: ! unauthorized_access ∧ ! session_confusion ∧ ! trust_boundary_bypass
A: ensure_header_validation ∧ limit_access_to_auth_users

[AUDIT]
Treat header_spoof_auth_bypass as a trust-boundary issue and apply strip_untrusted_header('x-user-id') before merge.

@sigil v0 hybrid
G: review(patch)
H: session_user_id_exposure ⇒ handler_rely_on_header_x-user-id_without_validation
P: validate_x-user-id → fall_back_to_session_userId_only_if_valid
V: test_headers_with_missing_x-user-id ∧ check_response_status_401_on_invalid_x-user-id
R: ! unauthorized_access ∧ ! session_id_leak
A: ensure_x-user-id_is_authenticated_before_use

[AUDIT]
Treat session_user_id_exposure as a trust-boundary issue and apply validate_x-user-id before merge.
